response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals and 20 years of progressive experience, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ expertise is dated (2014–2015), and his career trajectory over the past decade has centered on TypeScript/Node.js web services and AI infrastructure—not industrial systems. The role demands current, hands-on C++ and STL proficiency, industrial automation/IoT background, and security standards expertise (IEC 62443, SDL), none of which are evident. He would require significant retraining on the industrial automation domain and security practices.
strengths: 20 years of progressive senior/staff experience with proven ability to design and optimize high-performance systems, including low-latency micro-services handling millions of requests/second
Deep expertise in software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile methodology) and strong track record mentoring teams and contributing to open-source projects
Polyglot developer demonstrating architectural thinking and the ability to learn new domains and technologies quickly across multiple languages and platforms
concerns: C++ skills are severely dated (last significant work in 2014–2015); recent 10 years focused entirely on TypeScript/Node.js, with no evidence of modern C++, STL, or concurrent programming expertise
No background in industrial automation, machinery manufacturing, IoT systems, or industrial control; expertise is exclusively web/backend and AI infrastructure
No demonstrated knowledge of critical security standards (IEC 62443, SDL), industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or cybersecurity practices required for industrial machinery solutions

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise gap (10+ years since last significant work)
Absence of industrial automation/IoT/machinery domain experience
Strong software engineering fundamentals and proven learning agility
